title: selaginella prostrata
intro: Selaginella prostrata, also known as creeping spikemoss or prostrate spikemoss, is a low-growing, evergreen plant species belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Asia, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Selaginella prostrata can be found in traditional remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
